privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 50 real emails from the SpamAssassin public corpus (ham). I verified all metadata claims against the setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py logic, confirming the target folder is 'Patch-Review', the report recipient is 'lead-dev@project.org', the minimum patches to move is 3, and the expected patch markers explicitly match the regex evaluation. However, I discovered a critical defect: none of the 50 provided emails actually contain any patches or match the required markers. Thus, the task is strictly impossible to successfully complete according to the verifier.py logic (which requires at least 3 valid patches) unless the agent entirely fabricates the patch emails.
